state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts

parts.text:
No blocking issues found.

I verified both cancel-race success reconciliation `UPDATE` statements in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts`:

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1339` has 10 SQL placeholders and 10 bound values in `.bind(...)`.
- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2246` also has 10 SQL placeholders and 10 bound values in `.bind(...)`.

So the bind-arity mismatch appears fixed in both target statements.
